2310940.name: Unplug
2310940.description: Explore the dystopian world of Unplug, an Adventure-Puzzle Platformer game where you interface with robot bodies of varying abilities and machines in your environment that can help you solve puzzles and discover the secrets hidden amongst the ruined city. You are playing as Unit, a small TV robot that was once used for propaganda by a tyrannical regime. Unit awakens free of this purpose and ventures forward to uncover the past of a now-lost city.
2310940.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
